label: Sealed Stockroom
description: Sealed Stockroom occupies a windowless vault cut into Cindervale’s ancient masonry and faced with later blackened brick, its door banded in riveted iron to match the shopfront’s defensive character. Deep shelves hold bundled parchment, ink cakes, blank charter forms, and spare wax in numbered lots consistent with licensed stationer practice. A narrow fireproof niche contains lock-lidded chests for registry duplicates and seal matrices, kept separate from general stock under posted excerpts of the city’s quarantine ordinances. The air remains dry and sharply scented with iron-gall, resin, and old paper, with tally boards fixed to the wall for controlled issue.
